apartment.pageDescription: Rent the entire Maison Ayaba apartment in Fidjrossè, Cotonou: choose 1, 2 or 3 bedrooms. Living room, kitchen, terrace always included. From €60/night.
apartment.sectionSubtitle: One apartment, all yours — simply choose the number of bedrooms you need.
apartment.tourSubtitle: Living room, kitchen, terrace — common areas you enjoy in full, no matter how many bedrooms you choose.
apartment.bedroomsSubtitle: Choose 1, 2, or 3 bedrooms based on your needs — each with its own bathroom.
apartment.howItWorks: Maison Ayaba is a complete apartment that you rent entirely. Choose 1, 2, or 3 bedrooms based on your needs — but you always enjoy the living room, equipped kitchen, terrace, and all amenities.
apartment.amenitiesSubtitle: All these amenities are included, no matter how many bedrooms you choose
apartment.config1chDescription: The entire apartment for you alone or as a couple. Dedicated office, high-speed WiFi and air conditioning — with full access to the living room, equipped kitchen, and terrace.
apartment.config2chDescription: The entire apartment with 2 bedrooms. Perfect for a couple or small family — living room, equipped kitchen and all the comforts for an independent stay in Fidjrossè.
apartment.config3chDescription: The entire apartment with all 3 bedrooms. Our best value for groups and families — up to 6 guests, baby crib available, washing machine and private terrace.
apartment.finalCtaSubtitle: Choose the number of bedrooms and book the entire apartment on Airbnb

neighborhood.pageDescription: Discover the Fidjrossè neighborhood in Cotonou: restaurants, transport (zem, Gozem), beach 10 min away, points of interest. Practical guide for your stay.
neighborhood.heroSubtitle: A residential area popular with expats — between beach, restaurants and amenities. Everything you need to know for your stay.
neighborhood.introDesc: Fidjrossè is a calm, safe residential area located by the seaside in Cotonou. Popular with expats and families, it offers a pleasant living environment with all services nearby. Maison Ayaba is located in Fidjrossè Jacquot, a 10-minute walk from the beach.
neighborhood.sectionRestaurantsDesc: From local maquis to more established restaurants, you'll find something for every craving just minutes from the apartment.
neighborhood.restaurant1Detail: Local dishes (atassi, cassoulet, etc.) right across from the apartment · 100–1,000 FCFA depending on quantity · Cash only · Served immediately
neighborhood.restaurant2Detail: Local dishes · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant3Detail: Grilled meats · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant4Detail: Local dishes and vegan · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant5Detail: International and European · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.restaurant6Detail: Local dishes and brunch · 10 min walk · 5,000–10,000 FCFA · Cash or Mobile Money (MoMo) · ~30 min wait
neighborhood.sectionCommercesDesc: Everything you need within reach — supermarkets, pharmacies, local market.
neighborhood.sectionTransportsDesc: Several reliable and affordable options to move around with peace of mind.
neighborhood.transportZemDesc: The most common mode of transport in Cotonou. You hail them on the street, they're everywhere.
neighborhood.transportZemPrice: 200–500 FCFA per ride in the city (~€0.30–0.80)
neighborhood.transportZemTip: Negotiate the price before getting on. Ask for a helmet — it's mandatory.
neighborhood.transportGozemDesc: Mobile app similar to Uber. In-app payment, fare displayed upfront, safer option.
neighborhood.transportGozemTip: Download the app before you arrive. Also works for deliveries.
neighborhood.transportChauffeurDesc: Arranged through your host. Ideal for excursions or day trips.
neighborhood.transportChauffeurTip: Ask your host — they know trusted drivers.
neighborhood.transportAeroportDesc: Cadjehoun Airport is ~20 minutes from Fidjrossè. Shuttle or private driver available.
neighborhood.sectionPlageDesc: Fidjrossè beach is one of the neighborhood's main assets — fine sand, local atmosphere.
neighborhood.plage2Detail: Beach frequented by locals — beach bars, coconut vendors, relaxed vibe
neighborhood.plage3Detail: Currents can be strong — swim cautiously. Prefer supervised areas
neighborhood.sectionPointsInteretDesc: Cotonou and its surroundings are full of places to discover — culture, history, nature.
neighborhood.poi2Detail: Historic square in the heart of the city
neighborhood.poi3Detail: The largest market in West Africa — a must-see experience
neighborhood.finalCtaSubtitle: Book the entire apartment in Fidjrossè and start planning your stay in Cotonou
neighborhood.faqRestaurantsQ: What restaurants are near Maison Ayaba in Fidjrossè?
neighborhood.faqRestaurantsA: Several options nearby: a local kitchen right across the street (Beninese dishes from 100 FCFA, served immediately), and within a 10 min walk: Kalebasse, Jardin de Canelya, Paul Cuisine (vegan options), Le Lieu Unique and Felicita Café Coco (5,000–10,000 FCFA, cash or MoMo).
neighborhood.faqTransportQ: How to get around Cotonou from Fidjrossè?
neighborhood.faqTransportA: Several options: Zem (moto-taxi, 200-500 FCFA/ride), Gozem (ride-hailing app like Uber, 500-2000 FCFA), private driver through your host (15,000-25,000 FCFA/day). Cadjehoun Airport is 20 minutes away.
neighborhood.faqPlageQ: Is the beach close to Maison Ayaba?
neighborhood.faqPlageA: Yes, Fidjrossè beach is about a 10-minute walk from the apartment. It's a beach frequented by locals with beach bars and a relaxed atmosphere. Cautious swimming recommended due to currents.

host.pageDescription: Meet the host of Maison Ayaba in Cotonou and the Kwabo Protocol: anticipatory hospitality, welcome basket. A stay designed for you.
host.heroSubtitle: Behind Maison Ayaba, a host who knows Cotonou and anticipates your every need.
host.name: Guillaume
host.introStory:
Coming from the diaspora, I discovered Cotonou and fell in love with the city's energy. But when looking for quality accommodation, I noticed a gap: comfortable, reliable apartments designed for discerning travelers simply didn't exist.

I decided to create what I wished I had found. Maison Ayaba is an apartment in Fidjrossè — a calm neighborhood, close to the beach, 20 minutes from the airport — equipped so you don't have to worry about a thing: automatic inverter (zero blackouts for you), AC in every room, high-speed WiFi, smart lock.

An on-site team, documented processes. This isn't an improvised Airbnb — it's a structured hospitality brand. And that changes everything for your experience.
host.philosophyDesc: I believe great accommodation isn't just four walls and a bed. It's a place that lets you live normally from day one.
host.value1Desc: From mattress quality to WiFi speed to the type of coffee maker — everything is designed so you don't have to think about it.
host.value2Desc: Yes, there are power outages in Cotonou. No, they won't affect you — the inverter kicks in automatically. I'd rather tell you things as they are.
host.value3Desc: The questions you don't dare ask — airport transfer, neighborhood safety, where to eat — I've already answered them. That's the Kwabo Protocol.
host.kwaboTitle: Drop your bags, we'll handle the rest
host.kwaboSubtitle: "Kwabo" means "welcome" in Fon, the local language. It's also our promise: every stay begins with the little touches that make the difference.
host.kwaboMessageDesc: Before your arrival, we prepare your stay together — airport transfer tips, restaurant recommendations, practical questions. You don't land in the unknown.
host.kwaboClimDesc: Fresh linens, WiFi configured, everything is in place. You arrive to a welcoming, ready-to-live apartment — not a construction site.
host.kwaboPanierDesc: Fresh seasonal fruits, cold drinks, coffee and next morning's breakfast. Everything to start your stay without rushing to the supermarket.
host.kwaboMotDesc: A personalized welcome to start your stay on the right foot — because feeling welcome changes everything.
host.finalCtaSubtitle: Choose the number of bedrooms and book with confidence
